title: eulophia rauhii
intro: Eulophia rauhii, also known as the orchid or grass-leaved orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Eulophia rauhii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by boiling its roots and leaves in water to release its medicinal compounds.
